data.title: GitHub Copilot Dev Days Comes to Florida - One Event, One City, One Chance
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida on April 28, 2026, NLP Logix announced their sponsorship of the sole GitHub Copilot Dev Days event in the state. This free, in-person gathering aims to illustrate the impact of AI-driven coding on contemporary software development. Scheduled for May 7th, the event will run from 5:30 PM to 8:30 PM.

data.title: Mill Creek Announces Start of Preleasing at Modera Chandler
data.description: A popular garden-style community in Southeast Phoenix in Chandler, Arizona is expanding by 345 new homes. Mill Creek Residential, a prominent developer, owner-operator, and investment manager known for high-quality rental housing nationwide, revealed the commencement of this project on April 28, 2026.

data.title: Communiqué from Boliden's Annual General Meeting
data.description: In Stockholm on April 28, 2026, the Annual General Meeting of Boliden took place live in Askersund/Zinkgruvan and via postal voting. The Board of Directors was a key focus, with decisions made for the re-election of Karl-Henrik Sundström, Helene Biström, Tomas Eliasson, Perttu.... This event was significant, particularly for shareholders and those interested in the company's leadership, with attendance numbers and voting outcomes shaping the future direction of the organization.

data.title: Microchip Expands its Family of Post-Quantum‑Ready Root of Trust Controllers for Next‑Generation Systems
data.description: Microchip is currently addressing the real-world challenge of transitioning to post-quantum cryptography. This shift is no longer a topic for the future, as the company is actively working on it now. This transition involves implementing new encryption techniques to secure data in the face of quantum computing advancements. Microchip's efforts reflect the growing urgency to update cryptographic systems as quantum computing poses a threat to current encryption methods. The company's work exemplifies the proactive approach needed to address this issue promptly, acknowledging the need for advanced security measures to safeguard sensitive information.

data.title: OpenAI did not meet its targets due to rising compute costs, particularly with ChatGPT growth and an upcoming IPO.
data.description: Challenges within the company's expansion of ChatGPT, coupled with a forthcoming IPO, has brought scrutiny to Sam Altman's aggressive spending approach on computing resources.

data.title: #WERIDETOGETHER EARNS NEARLY 20 AWARD NOMINATIONS AND 124+ MILLION VIEWS FOR ITS FOUR-PART PSA CAMPAIGN SERIES "OUT OF BOUNDS"
data.description: A recent series focused on the experiences of sexual violence victims, consisting of four PSAs and expert roundtable talks. The initiative emphasizes the importance of propelling awareness toward tangible actions. The project was launched in WOODSIDE, Calif. on April 28, 2026, aiming to engage viewers and spark conversations on this critical issue.

data.title: Amber International Holding Limited Reports Fourth Quarter and  Full Year 2025 Unaudited Financial Results
data.description: In the first year as a Nasdaq-listed company, revenue experienced a substantial 784.1% year-on-year increase, reaching a total of US$66.1 million. Alongside this growth, the company successfully acquired a VARA VASP license, which significantly broadened its reach into the rapidly expanding family office and institutional market in the UAE. Furthermore, the introduction of the innovative "A-Suite" architecture was announced, marking the scheduled launch of the initial AI-native operating system.

data.title: Rochefort Asset Management Closes Senior Secured Loan for Firehawk Aerospace to Advance Domestic Propulsion and Munitions Manufacturing Capacity
data.description: In West Palm Beach, Florida on April 28, 2026, Rochefort Asset Management revealed the completion of a senior secured loan for Firehawk. Rochefort Asset Management is an investment management firm in the United States, specializing in national security with a license under the Office of Strategic Capital of the U.S. Department of War (DoW). This loan signifies a significant financial transaction that highlights the firm's commitment to secure investments in this sector.

data.title: Missed Out? Domino's® is Giving Customers a Second Chance at Its 50% Off Pizza Deal After Online Ordering Glitch
data.description: From May 6 to May 9, customers in ANN ARBOR, Mich., can enjoy a 50% discount on all menu-priced pizzas at Domino's. The online ordering systems experienced disruptions due to third-party technology problems on April 24, causing inconvenience to customers looking to order during the pizza deal.

data.title: Off-The-Clock Recruiting: 52% Have Recruited Candidates Outside Work
data.description: A recent report by Zety® unveiled the strategies used by hiring managers to find job candidates in common locations such as gyms and grocery stores. The report, titled Off-The-Clock Recruiting Report, highlighted trends in recruitment practices. Released on April 28, 2026, in Guaynabo, Puerto Rico, the study provides insights into how employers are spotting potential hires in unconventional settings. The report, which focuses on everyday environments, offers valuable information for job seekers and recruiters alike. This data-driven analysis sheds light on the methods companies are employing to identify talent outside traditional recruitment channels.

data.title: Bioretec Ltd adjusts the terms and conditions of its stock option programs due to the completed rights issue
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Helsinki at 13:40 EEST, Bioretec Ltd made a public statement regarding their recent activities. They successfully concluded a rights issue, known as the "Offering," through which 1,286,801,534 new shares of the company were issued. This move represents a significant developmental milestone for Bioretec Ltd.

data.title: Pentagon's Former Principal Director for Autonomy to Keynote Advanced Manufacturing User Expo in the Mahoning Valley
data.description: Renowned defense technology expert Dr. Jaret C. Riddick is set to share his insights at the AMUX event on May 20 in Niles, Ohio. The event will take place at the Eastwood Event Centre in YOUNGSTOWN, Ohio. YBI (Youngstown Business Incubator) revealed on April 28, 2026, that Dr. Riddick will headline the second edition of this gathering.

data.title: Watercress Financial Announces $550 Million Forward Flow Partnership with 26North to Expand Home Improvement Financing and Flexible Payment Options
data.description: Watercress Financial, based in West Des Moines, Iowa, has revealed a significant partnership with 26North Partners LP worth $550 million. The collaboration aims to facilitate the expansion of home improvement financing services across the nation.
